settings.content_language_note: Language of the displayed data (names, titles, texts). Independent of the interface; when a record isn't available, the next language is used.

intro.cookie: We use only essential, functional cookies. No analytics, no tracking.
intro.dataLang: Switzerland has four national languages, and this data comes in several of them. Some records are in multiple languages, some in only one. You can choose which language the content is shown in; when your choice isn't available for a record, the remaining languages are used in a set priority order. This is independent of the interface language. Set it under Settings › Content language (top right).
intro.alt: This page is also available in English.
